title: Whimsical Vanilla Horses
description: Better horses with stylized visuals: textures and model!
body:
## ⋆｡° Whimsical Horses ⋆｡°

Whimsical Horses is a resourcepack for vanilla horses! 
The resourcepack uses optifine, making the mods "Entity Model Features" and "Entity Texture Features! required!

🐎 Changes: 
- New horse model, including lashes and better anatomy!
- New horse textures!
- New stylized saddles! Each horse has their own flowers they carry!
- 16 coats!
- Better rider sitting position!

🐎 FAQ:
Why are my foal textures broken? 
Unfortunately due to how minecraft works, it broke, I cannot fix it.

Why are there no armor / armor variations?
Full armor did not match the style I was going for well, therefore I made it very light. Im still trying to figure it out.
